text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 117 

PRVDR_NUM 

LABEL: Provider Number 

DESCRIPTION: A data element to capture the identification number used to distinguish providers from one another 
on claims and other interactions between providers and other entities. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_NUM 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 30 (prior to the 2023 file, the length was 12) 

FILE(S): APR Identifiers
